pageContext.name: Official Cayde-6
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Numskull present from the popular shoot and loot game series Destiny, the Official Cayde-6 Statue!   A skilled gunslinger and an avid gambler, there's nothing that Cayde-6 enjoys more than the thrill of battle. His care-free attitude and loose approach to rules makes him an unpredictable adversary.  This brand-new Cayde-6 statue stands at 10 inches tall and comes with all of the finishing touches that fans would expect to see, including his rugged cloak and bright Exo eyes.  This super-exclusive collector's item is a must-have for any fan of the Destiny franchise.
